task: Implement live MCP server health probing in context-orchestrator
edits: Added MCP inventory typing, transport classification, and richer parsing in context-orchestrator/src/services/index-service.ts and src/types.ts.
Added persisted MCP probe storage in context-orchestrator/src/storage/sqlite.ts and src/storage/index.ts.
Added probe_mcp_servers tool and merged mcpHealth into get_orchestrator_status in context-orchestrator/src/gateway/server.ts and wired startup in src/main.ts.
Added probe/input schema support in context-orchestrator/src/schema.ts.
Added test fixture and coverage in tests/fixtures/stdio-test-server.mjs, tests/mcp-health.test.ts, tests/index-service.test.ts, and tests/gateway.test.ts.
verification: Short-run node dist/main.js launch was inconclusive; process stayed alive until forced termination and only emitted the SQLite experimental warning during capture.
outcome: Orchestrator can now classify configured MCP servers, probe live reachability, persist latest probe state, and surface MCP health in status and dedicated gateway tool output.
